data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for real-time or near-real-time inventory updates, but the evidence does not demonstrate that this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions the need for such updates, yet there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided to confirm that inventory updates occur in real-time or near-real-time. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement's fulfillment.
gaps: No evidence of real-time or near-real-time inventory updates validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify real-time inventory updates.
